mapper.select: SELECT mc.store_id FROM menu m JOIN menu_category mc ON m.category_id = mc.category_id WHERE m.menu_id = #{menuId}
SELECT cart_id AS cartId, user_no AS userNo, store_id AS storeId FROM cart WHERE user_no = #{userNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT cd.cart_item_id AS id, cd.menu_id AS menuID, m.name AS menuName, m.price AS price, cd.quantity AS quantity, m.menu_pic AS menuPic FROM cart_detail cd JOIN menu m ON cd.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE cd.cart_id = #{cartId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_detail (cart_id, menu_id, quantity) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{menuId}, #{quantity})
